name: Fran Hong
subject: These are the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
They pay more. You pay less.
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260507-2794)
Peter,
I think it's time to rename my Tax the Rich policy. A more accurate title would be "Tax the Super Rich, Make Big Corporations Pay Their Fair Share, and Lower Taxes for Working People.”
Here’s what I’m proposing:
1. **A new top tax bracket for households earning over $1 million.** Roughly 9,300 Wisconsin filers fall into this bracket, and frankly, they can afford it. The higher rate only applies to dollars above the threshold, so a couple earning $1.2 million pays the new rate on that $200,000.
2. **A 1.2-point increase on the existing top bracket.** For couples earning above $431,000 (and $323,000 for single filers) the rate goes up by just over one percentage point. That means a couple earning $500,000 pays about $830 more per year. The lower tax brackets, where the vast majority of Wisconsinites live, don't move at all.
3. **A new corporate income tax bracket on profits above $1 million.** This is about big, profitable corporations that disproportionately benefit from our current tax code. And critically, this only applies to C-corporations — the vast majority of Wisconsin's small businesses are LLCs, S-corps, sole proprietorships, and partnerships, which won't be impacted.

**Why it works:** Every dollar raised goes straight back to Wisconsin's public schools. Special education reimbursement rises from 42% to 90%. School districts can finally stop going to referendum after referendum just to cover the basics. And Wisconsin's economy benefits when every kid in the state gets the world-class education they deserve.
**And the cherry on top? Property taxes will decrease up to 44%.**
Tax the Super Rich, Make Big Corporations Pay Their Fair Share, and Lower Taxes for Working People. It’s a terrible name for a policy, but it’s a great idea for Wisconsin.
**[If that sounds good to you, chip in $44 to help us make it happen.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260507.erHvjl&refcode=em20260507-2794&t=1&akid=2794%2E105371%2E8CJtGn)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260507.erHvjl&amount=5&refcode=em20260507-2794&t=20&akid=2794%2E105371%2E8CJtGn)**
With gratitude,
Fran
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_fh_footer?refcode=em20260507-2794&t=21&refcode2=2794_105371_8CJtGn&akid=2794%2E105371%2E8CJtGn)**
---
Email us: [info@francescahong.com](mailto:info@francescahong.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most powerful tools that grassroots campaigns like ours have to reach everyday people across Wisconsin and beyond, so thank you for reading to the end.
The more people who engage with our emails, the more likely we’ll go straight to your inbox. For a free and easy way to help our campaign, please [click this link to our website](https://francescahong.com/) after you finish reading our emails.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=22&akid=2794%2E105371%2E8CJtGn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.francescahong.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=2794%2E105371%2E8CJtGn)

Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong

name: Kshama for Congress
subject: FUND HEALTHCARE, NOT WAR! Town Hall Saturday
body:
Attend in person in Seattle and several other cities, or via livestream

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kshamasawant/socialists-for-kshama-13701674?e=bbdb764b3a)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/If6C82fK6bb?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)
| | Dear Peter,
Right now, millions of working people in the United States are facing a harsh reality. Healthcare has been getting more and more expensive for decades, and **last year Republicans and some Democrats decided to allow the Affordable Care Act subsidies to expire, causing health insurance premiums to skyrocket even more**. People across the country are being forced to make impossible choices — pay more, go without coverage, or risk medical debt.
At the same time, the war on Iran has taken thousands of lives so far and thrown the Middle East into further crisis. This comes on top of the devastating and ongoing genocide being carried out by the Israeli state against the Palestinian people. **All of this war and bloodshed and genocide has been fully backed by the Republican AND Democratic parties.** Even the most "progressive" wing of the Democratic Party is complicit, as we saw when Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez voted **against** cutting $500 million of military aid to Israel. **Kshama's opponent, Democratic Congressman Adam Smith, voted along with hundreds of Democrats just last year to send Trump a $900 billion blank check for war.**
---
|
---
| | [**Town Hall: FUND HEALTHCARE, NOT WAR! - attend in person or via livestream**](https://us.list-manage.com/vNZ3PNcH1dS?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)
**Saturday, May 9 @ 2pm PT
Casa Latina**, 317 17th Ave SSeattle, WA, 98144
**Not in Seattle? Join one of our in-person meetings to watch the livestream followed by discussion:**
* **Peoria, IL** @ 3:45pm CT - Central Illinois FRIENDS Community Center, 2112 E War Memorial Dr
* **Rochester, MN** @ 3:45pm CT - Rochester Public Library, 2nd Floor, at 101 2nd St SE
* **San Jose, CA** @ 2pm PT - MLK Library, Room #764, at 150 E San Fernando St
* [**Livestream online**](https://us.list-manage.com/108vpHF2MLs?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15) @ 2pm PT / 4pm CT / 5pm ET

**We need to defeat corporate genocidal Democrat Adam Smith—and elect the first-ever revolutionary socialist to Congress!**
---
| [RSVP NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/mqaJBnpvVyI?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)
---
| |
Last year when Trump and the Republicans carried out devastating cuts of over $1 trillion from Medicaid and Medicare, the Democratic Party chose not to fight back. These two programs cover health insurance for 144 million people — nearly two in five Americans.
The Democratic Party has control of the state House, state Senate, and Governorship in California, Illinois, and Washington state. They could have used those so-called “trifectas” to tax the rich for free healthcare for all. They didn’t, because **the Democratic Party represents the same billionaire and multimillionaire interests as the Republican Party**.
In fact, just last month, the California Legislature quietly shut down yet another attempt to establish a state-run single payer health care system.
Kshama’s opponent Adam Smith has been in office almost three decades and has given nothing but lip service to the dire healthcare crisis facing working people. Recently he signed on to sponsor a Medicare for All bill in order to whitewash his image as he faces his toughest opponent ever. This is a decades old strategy of Democrats, to sponsor progressive bills that they have no intention of fighting for, in order to create the illusion that their party is for working people. But Adam Smith has voted for every war and for trillions of dollars for all of those wars — money that could have instead been spent on healthcare to dramatically improve people's lives.
The Democratic Party is utterly rotten. They are more afraid of working-class movements than they are of Trump. Working people need a new party of our own. A party whose leaders fight against the bosses and all of their political servants.
We urgently need leaders who will fight to stop the endless violence of the billionaire-backed Democratic and Republican parties. We need leaders who will build movements to win what working people need, like a healthcare system that is free to use when you need it because it's fully funded by taxing the rich.**Kshama Sawant has an unparalleled track record as a fighter for working people—we need to fight to elect Kshama to Congress.**
**Kshama used her elected Seattle City Council position to lead movements that won the highest minimum wage in the nation, the Amazon Tax, many landmark renters' rights laws, Seattle’s Indigenous Peoples’ Day, free abortion, and much more.**
**Kshama is now using her campaign for Congress to fight for free healthcare for all funded by taxing the rich, to end the war on Iran and end all military aid to Israel, and to stop all weapons and tech for genocide and imperialist war.** Winning these victories will require mass organized civil disobedience and strike action. Building such movements will require fighting independent leaders, because the overwhelming majority of the left and labor leadership is tied at the hip to the Democratic Party and opposed to building working-class power.
**We need leaders like Kshama, with a proven track record of winning unparalleled victories for working people.** Let's fight to elect the first ever revolutionary socialist to the U.S. Congress!
Solidarity,Kshama for Congress
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/rhn_Xpg0EuP?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)
| | [**Can you donate $25, $100, or $500 now?**](https://us.list-manage.com/GHNLimFe777?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://us.list-manage.com/10FfFMtoriR?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)

---

Help build our independent movement to shut down ICE and stop the deportations, for a $25/hour minimum wage, to end U.S. military aid to Israel, for free healthcare for all by taxing the rich, for national rent control, and for a new party for the working class!
[**Donate $25, $100, or $500 now!**](https://us.list-manage.com/OCgkFOchQ0H?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)

| | | **Volunteer to build our fighting grassroots campaign!**
We have a real shot to win this campaign, but the Democratic Party will fight tooth and nail to keep Kshama out of Congress because they know she is a real fighter for working people. We need everyone to get involved to get the word out in order to defeat them!
[**Sign up to volunteer with our campaign today!**](https://us.list-manage.com/FuOmI9n4lGR?e=bbdb764b3a&c2id=8b3f9b08d69d5a7a0bcc2cd67f268e15)

Peter, Right now, the foundations of our free and fair elections are under direct attack.
1. **An election denier now oversees our election security** , after Georgia's Lieutenant Governor placed a pro-Trump 2020 conspiracy theorist in charge of the state's election systems.

2. **Trump used the office of President as a weapon for his own petty** , personal vengeance when he sent the FBI to raid a Fulton County election center in a futile attempt to prop up repeatedly-disproven lies about his 2020 election loss.

3. **And this week, poll workers were targeted for intimidation** , with Trump’s Justice Department subpoenaing the identities of every Fulton County election worker from 2020.

The federal government is targeting the very citizens who conduct our elections, Peter. This is a coordinated assault on your most fundamental right: **the right to have your vote counted.** But Georgia voters have shown they won't back down. In special elections across the state this year, you proved that change is within reach. You flipped key seats, built powerful momentum, and sent a clear message about the future you want for Georgia. **Now, we must protect that progress, Peter.** The Democratic Party of Georgia is fighting back on the ground — organizing in every community, registering voters, and spreading the truth to counter a tidal wave of misinformation. This work is our strongest defense — **but it relies on you.** [Peter, will you stand with us? Rush your $10 contribution to the Democratic Party of Georgia right now to help DPG continue fighting to ensure every Georgian can vote freely and safely.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130966138/619511564/266808143?&amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_050726_B1_FULTON_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDFkNjJiZC03MTRhLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1GLfYLB2cuBj7SPLhYxmLYTwP1k5ER6qmskxx_NpySk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

An election denier now oversees our election security , after Georgia's Lieutenant Governor placed a pro-Trump 2020 conspiracy theorist in charge of the state's election systems. 2. Trump used the office of President as a weapon for his own petty , personal vengeance when he sent the FBI to raid a Fulton County election center in a futile attempt to prop up repeatedly-disproven lies about his 2020 election loss. 3. And this week, poll workers were targeted for intimidation , with Trump’s Justice Department subpoenaing the identities of every Fulton County election worker from 2020. The federal government is targeting the very citizens who conduct our elections, Peter. This is a coordinated assault on your most fundamental right: the right to have your vote counted. name: Jena Griswold
subject: I won’t let anyone threaten your right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]
Hi Peter,
As Secretary of State, I’ve expanded voter access and protected our elections. That experience has helped prepare me to serve as your next Attorney General.
Right now, MAGA is escalating threats to voting access. And here’s what’s deeply concerning: The Department of Homeland Security still hasn’t provided a definitive answer to a basic question that Secretaries of State posed earlier this year: Will ICE be at voting locations in 2026?
No voter should ever have to wonder whether intimidation will meet them at the ballot box. I led other Secretaries of State in demanding answers from DHS. Their failure to answer is unacceptable.
secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg? [secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]
If we’re going to continue growing this campaign and be ready for what’s coming next, I need you by my side.
In Colorado, we protect the freedom to vote. Can you chip in a few dollars today to help me keep fighting to protect our democracy? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]
We’re in this fight together, and together, we will prevail!
— Jena

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: ABQ Council finally cracked down on homeless crisis
body:
Plus: did you catch what MLG looked like at the Derby? | New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/YA0qMEzTxtf?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
| | | | | |
After eight years of inaction, Albuquerque City Council [finally did something](https://us.list-manage.com/10EK629Jg56?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e) about the homeless crisis.
Meanwhile, Trump just made Sen. John Fetterman an offer no Democrat has ever gotten. **And did you catch what MLG wore to the Derby?!?**
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/lqEHOd0Z3IG?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
| |
🏛️ **ALBUQUERQUE COUNCIL FINALLY CRACKS DOWN**
The 6-3 vote passed Monday night. Democrat Joaquín Baca crossed the aisle and made the case that finally gave Mayor Tim Keller the cover he's needed for years.
Baca's quote on what real compassion looks like — versus the indifference of letting people die on the streets — is the line that should have been said a long time ago.
The real question now is whether the mayor actually enforces this, or whether the ordinance just stays on paper. Mark and Krysty get into it.

🏛️ **TRUMP'S QUIET PITCH TO FETTERMAN**
Politico just reported it: Trump has personally offered Sen. John Fetterman his total endorsement — plus a financial windfall — to flip to the GOP.
The most damning detail isn't the pitch. It's where Fetterman is eating lunch now.
His own party has frozen him out. He's spending hours in the GOP cloakroom. Sen. Katie Britt brings him meals.
Then Gov. Josh Shapiro went on national TV and said the quiet part out loud about how Democrats expect their senators to vote.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://us.list-manage.com/ECcrIXE4S4u?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
---
| |
🏇 **OH, AND THE GOVERNOR WORE A JOCKEY SUIT TO THE DERBY**
Custom-made. "MLG" on the front. A Zia sign on the chest.
The Santa Fe New Mexican called her "pint-sized." Forbes ran the photo.
**There is nobody left in that governor's office willing to tell her no. You need to see who she's standing next to.

** 🇺🇸 **RUBIO IN THE BAG**
Marco Rubio is filling in for Karoline Leavitt while she's on maternity leave. Mark says he's never seen him this comfortable behind a podium.
His answer on Iran — the people vs. the regime — is something we haven't heard from a Republican administration in a long time.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://us.list-manage.com/NGqwHoey6Yg?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
---
| |

PLUS: Trump's one-page memo that may end the Iran war. Spencer Pratt's AI Batman ad torching Karen Bass. A tribute to Ted Turner, the CNN founder who fell in love with New Mexico.
---
|
---
| | ✅ **Watch** on[ YouTube](https://us.list-manage.com/6fwu3t61LX_?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

✅ **SUBSCRIBE** to [our channel](https://us.list-manage.com/yT0pEqWn_gH?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e) and hit the 🔔 for updates

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://us.list-manage.com/SwIzRc_SEDR?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://us.list-manage.com/18nbiZYSv4Z?e=567664f14c&c2id=f551a60afe6194f7ea2dcf92821ad62e)
We're off Sunday for Mother's Day — back with you Monday. Happy Mother's Day to every mom in the No Doubt About It community.

**Mark & Krysty Ronchetti **
_No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️_

"MLG" on the front. A Zia sign on the chest. The Santa Fe New Mexican called her "pint-sized." Forbes ran the photo. There is nobody left in that governor's office willing to tell her no. You need to see who she's standing next to. 🇺🇸 RUBIO IN THE BAG Marco Rubio is filling in for Karoline Leavitt while she's on maternity leave. Mark says he's never seen him this comfortable behind a podium. His answer on Iran — the people vs. the regime — is something we haven't heard from a Republican administration in a long time. | | | PLUS: Trump's one-page memo that may end the Iran war. Spencer Pratt's AI Batman ad torching Karen Bass. A tribute to Ted Turner, the CNN founder who fell in love with New Mexico. | | | ✅ Watch on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 We're off Sunday for Mother's Day — back with you Monday. Happy Mother's Day to every mom in the No Doubt About It community. Mark & Krysty Ronchetti No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2026 Choose Adventure Media. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: No Pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell. Ever.
body:
Do not let them normalize freeing a child sex-trafficker. Take action!
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Trump: "No Pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell. Ever."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4caddb47-57f2-44cd-8175-33d12ea201b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdce333b-e2d7-4d4c-87a3-0fb64789dbe0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action?[Click here for others](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a1e9258-5fca-451e-b772-02855b58546f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Want to unsubscribe? See link below)_ Ghislaine Maxwell is a convicted child sex trafficker who helped Jeffrey Epstein prey on underage girls. Now there are growing fears that Donald Trump could try to pardon her. **[That must never happen](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb61c64d4-eb1f-4ba4-8a20-28606dd4ca59/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** **A presidential pardon for Maxwell would be an insult to victims, a grotesque abuse of power, and a moral stain on the country.**

Congressional Republicans must publicly oppose any effort to let Maxwell walk free, and Trump must clearly rule out granting her clemency.

**[Add your name now: Demand Trump publicly commit to NO pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6e71925-b37a-4a42-88f0-f0e8ed837330/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Melania documentary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Add your name if you want Amazon to give the American people answers

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2890%2E4032634%2E22w_dP)
---
I'm finally ready to share my review of the Melania movie with you. Just kidding. But in the time I could have spent watching it, I started asking some very serious questions — because what's happening here goes far beyond a documentary. Here's what we know: Amazon paid $40 million for the rights to the Melania film. Of that, about $28 million goes directly into Melania Trump's pocket. Amazon reportedly beat the next-highest bidder by a whopping $26 million. But the film didn’t even make $16.6 million at the box office. And it doesn’t appear that Amazon expects to break even. So why would one of the most powerful corporations in the world lose tens of millions of dollars on a movie? That’s what I want to find out. And I need you by my side to stay on this. [**Want to know why Amazon overpaid by tens of millions for a Trump family film while billions in federal favors were also up for consideration? Add your name to join me in demanding answers.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-amazon/?source=EW_EMZ31B_AMZ_ENG_20260507_F&t=8&akid=2890%2E4032634%2E22w_dP) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-amazon/?source=EW_EMZ31B_AMZ_ENG_20260507_F&t=9&akid=2890%2E4032634%2E22w_dP)
---
Is Jeff Bezos and Amazon willing to do whatever it takes to promote Mrs. Trump’s vanity project because they have a mountain of business pending before the Trump administration?
* A major **FTC antitrust lawsuit** that could fundamentally reshape Amazon's business model
* **Foreign trade deals** where Amazon lobbied the administration to bully other countries into dropping regulations
* **Corporate tax cuts** that have already shaved billions off Amazon's tax bill — last year alone, Amazon's federal tax bill dropped by 87%

Does that sound like it could be a bribe to you? I had the same question.
Federal anti-bribery laws prohibit offering anything of value to elected officials to influence their official acts.
And while we're on the subject of corruption, let’s not forget about the Trump Presidential Library fund.
Amazon, Meta, Paramount, X, and ABC all settled lawsuits with Trump by promising up to $63 million in donations to his presidential library.
But then that fund was mysteriously dissolved. So where did THAT money go?
Not one of those corporations could give a clear answer about where their multimillion-dollar donations are. And Trump certainly isn’t offering up any information on the subject.
[**If you want answers about Amazon’s payments to the Trump family, add your name here.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-amazon/?source=EW_EMZ31B_AMZ_ENG_20260507_F&t=10&akid=2890%2E4032634%2E22w_dP)
Donald Trump has turned the presidency into a nightmare of corruption.
This is exactly what I've been warning about. And I'm not going to stop fighting until we get real answers.
Thanks for being part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: You’re Invited: San Bruno Mountain Grand Opening Celebration
body:
View this email in your browser (https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0de6409127)

============================================================

Good afternoon!

We’re excited to invite you to the Grand Opening Celebration of the newly improved San Bruno Mountain Day Use Area!

Join San Mateo County Parks, California State Parks, and community members as we celebrate exciting new improvements that make this beautiful outdoor space more welcoming and accessible for everyone.

📅 Wednesday, May 13, 2026
⏰ 11:00 AM
📍 Saddle Area – San Bruno Mountain
555 Guadalupe Canyon Parkway, Brisbane, CA

The improvements include:
✅ ADA-accessible picnic areas
✅ Brand-new restroom facility
✅ Interpretive pavilion & displays
✅ Scenic mountain views
✅ Family-friendly outdoor gathering space

Enjoy a fun community ribbon-cutting celebration, photo opportunities, and the chance to explore one of our county’s most scenic outdoor destinations.

Bring a picnic, enjoy the fresh air, and celebrate this exciting park improvement project with us!

We hope to see you there. Please RSVP to Mike: ** mrichardson@smcgov.org (mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=May%2013th%20Event%20)

David J. Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=0de6409127)

name: Blue Amp Action Poll Desk
subject: $1 bill, signed by Trump??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| The Hill says 92% of Democrats oppose adding Trump’s signature to U.S. currency. Do you agree?
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=1&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11950?t=2&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp)Peter, this is not a joke: **Donald Trump wants his signature added to U.S. currency.** [](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12603?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2026.05.07_Trump-Currency_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=3&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp) _Yes, really._ The same Donald Trump who plastered his name on buildings, steaks, planes, and hats now wants his signature printed on our money. And Democrats are overwhelmingly against it. According to _The Hill_ , **92% of Democrats** oppose adding Trump’s signature to our money. So we need to know where you stand: [**Do you believe Donald Trump should be allowed to add his signature to all U.S. currency?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12603?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2026.05.07_Trump-Currency_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp) | [NO, ABSOLUTELY NOT→](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12603?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2026.05.07_Trump-Currency_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp)
---
**This is classic Trump:** turning public institutions into personal branding opportunities.
Our money should not become another Trump vanity project. Not another billboard for his ego. Not another place for him to slap his name and pretend it belongs to him.
U.S. currency belongs to the American people — not Donald Trump.
Please take our quick Blue Amp Action poll before midnight:****[**Should Trump be allowed to add his signature to U.S. currency?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12603?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2026.05.07_Trump-Currency_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp)
[NO →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12603?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2026.05.07_Trump-Currency_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=7&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp)
---
[YES →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12603?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2026.05.07_Trump-Currency_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=8&akid=2217%2E259176%2E7EpzPp)
---

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

I was grateful to speak directly to so many Coloradans tonight about why I’m ready to be our next governor. **This was an important chance to show that _we are the campaign for Colorado,_ and we made the most of it!**
But tonight’s debate stands out for another reason. It was one of the few times in recent months where the other candidate in this race actually _showed up_ in the same room to speak directly to voters, who have an important decision to make by June 30th.
These are a few other key differences that drove tonight’s debate win:
Unlike the other candidate in this race, I’m prepared to hit the ground running as your governor. **Because my experience in our state government will mean I can get things done _starting on day one._**
Unlike the other candidate in this race, since Trump’s inauguration last year, I’ve taken every chance I’ve had to stand up to the president and his lawless administration. **Because I don’t give in to bullies — _I fight back._**
And unlike the other candidate in this race, I’m not seeking support from out-of-state billionaires. **Because I’m in this race for everyday people — _not the wealthy few or powerful special interests._**
**[I’m ready to be a governor who shows up and _fights like hell_ for our agenda of freedom, affordability, and opportunity. And I can’t do it without you on the team. So I’ll ask again: can you keep our momentum going by chipping in $7 tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130966963/619545170/2032434969?amount=7&refcode=ea.47331560-7a4a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.47331560-7a4a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMzMTU2MC03YTRhLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dXxGqC4EuikbzzsZupJpa1ywyq1vbkF-Opcjom-nGRQ=)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: high gear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Our first ad is live.
#
Hey Peter – it's Sherrod Brown.
**We're on the air with our first ad. This is the moment when things kick into high gear.**
Going on the air is a pivotal moment for a campaign. We're making crucial budget decisions every day, and whether or not we hit our daily grassroots fundraising goals determines if we can keep these ads running – or if we need to take them down.
The role that this team plays becomes even more important, Peter. It's because of generous folks chipping in a couple bucks here and there that we've been able to launch our first ad so early and with such force. Now, I need you to step up again.
In a state like Ohio, we can’t afford to leave a single stone unturned. That means running ads far and wide and reaching voters in every single corner.
National Republicans are already pouring $80 million into Ohio and we’re expecting millions more to come, so we have to replenish our ads stockpile constantly. **[Will you rush $15 – split between my campaign and State Democrats Committee – to help us keep these ads on the air so we can reach all Ohioans, flip this seat, and take back the Senate majority?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104447?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=1&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104448?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104448?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104448?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104448?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104448?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104448?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104447?refcode=em20260507-10466&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=10466%2E614464%2ErWMQav)

Sherrod

name: Christine Bish
subject: CA Families are being priced out of their homes
body:
That is absolutely unacceptable.
---
| | | | [ View in browser](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/sh/WCPxRrNLV1LtwSCEGcqYZQVm93Fhn2uH/i8g2PI0L7BsM)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Friends,
Wildfire season used to mean watching the hills, checking evacuation routes, and praying the wind did not shift toward our communities.
Now the crisis is hitting families before a fire even starts.
Homeowners across California’s 3rd Congressional District are being dropped by insurance carriers, pushed into expensive state-mandated coverage, or forced to wonder whether they can afford to stay in the home they worked for years to buy.
That is absolutely unacceptable.
Gavin Newsom has allowed this crisis to get worse while families in foothill and mountain communities pay the price. Ami Bera has had years in Washington, and our families are still stuck with rising premiums, shrinking coverage, and no serious federal plan to stabilize the market.
**That’s why I am running for Congress. Because our district needs a representative who understands this crisis and is ready to fix it.**
---

| [ SEND CHRISTINE TO CONGRESS TO FIX THIS!](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ6uvfh6CvvTeS466g94v5105/tV2M7aPcci0D)
---
|
**I recently announced my Wildfire Act, a federal proposal designed to protect communities, lower long-term costs, and restore real stability to the wildfire insurance market.**
This plan focuses on prevention before disaster strikes. It rewards homeowners and communities that reduce risk, strengthens coordination between federal and local agencies, and creates a responsible framework to help restore access to coverage in wildfire-prone areas.
_For families in Truckee, South Lake Tahoe, Grass Valley, Placerville, Auburn, El Dorado County, and across the foothills, this is not some distant policy debate._
This is about whether people can keep their homes insured.
This is about whether families can afford their mortgage.
**This is about whether our communities have a future while Sacramento and Washington keep reacting after the damage is done.**

---

| | |
---
| | | [**I also sat down with ABC10 to discuss this proposal because I want voters to know exactly what I will fight for in Congress.**](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ72ijjJTI0xKDoFtovy2KicD/Yb8pXiUxl0cP)
**California families need relief. Our firefighters need support. Our local governments need a serious partner. Homeowners need a system that rewards mitigation and restores confidence instead of leaving them trapped in uncertainty.**
_The primary is coming up fast, and this campaign needs the resources to carry this message across the district._
Bera will have the establishment behind him.
Newsom’s allies will keep defending the same failed policies that helped create this mess.
[**I am asking you to help me take this fight directly to the voters who are living with the consequences.**](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ7AVnlWje6QzzYPgxir9aQEL/GMUtZV1esRMf)
---
| | | | [ DONATE NOW TO SAVE CALIFORNIA!](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ7IIrnk00BuflIZU6VkGq7qT/8nN0R4K0gS8Q)
---
| | [******Your support helps us reach more families, promote this plan, and build the campaign operation we need to win.**](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ7Q5vpxGMHOLX2jHFIdO5pSb/pwRYlKHtpS3u)
California’s 3rd District deserves leadership, and YOU deserve leadership that sees the danger clearly and acts before another crisis gets worse. Before another fire destroys our homes.
I am ready to fight for that in Congress. And I am ready to fight for you and your family.
Thank you for your support,Christine BishCandidate for Congress, CA-03
---
| | | |
---
**bishforcongress.com**
8121 Golden Vista Way, 95843, Antelope
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
[_Unsubscribe_](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/v2/sh/WCPxRrWByckTj8nTRQetzL09AeXc94sL/CSKzaVRl7NBQ)

name: Annie Andrews
subject: I used to race bikes. Now I’m racing to defeat Lindsey Graham.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
Growing up with two brothers, I had a fierce competitive streak.
I was the only girl on my little league baseball team and could catch my dad’s pop-flies in the backyard better than my brothers.
The three of us would set up Indy 500-style bike races on our cul-de-sac. Winner got bragging rights. Loser got the snacks from the house. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
Fast forward a few decades and I’m channeling that same energy into a much bigger race: Taking down Lindsey Graham and flipping South Carolina blue.
He’s been in the Senate since I was 22. I’ve had 3 kids, cared for thousands more, and taught hundreds of med students and residents.
And let me tell you — they all deserve better than the future Lindsey Graham is fighting for.
I’m in this race because I’ve got fire. I’ve got purpose. And unlike him, I’ve got a soul.
But, I’ve never been the one to back down from a tough race. That’s why I’ve set an ambitious $250,000 fundraising goal to show Graham that we have the power to win this.
Can I count on you to rush a split donation of $10 between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and my campaign right away so we can hit our April goals? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
HELP ME DEFEAT LINDSEY GRAHAM! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
We've got a race to win.
Annie
CHIP IN TO STOP MAGA EXTREMISM!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]

| Holy smokes! Gov. Gavin Newsom has officially called ANOTHER special election for Congress, this time in CA-14. That means California Democrats are now preparing for _**TWO**_ major special elections before November: ➡️ CA-01
➡️ CA-14 And with the Republican House Majority hanging by a thread, these races could impact control of Congress even _BEFORE_ the midterms in November. **[Please, will you rush a donation right now to fund organizing in special elections and in swing U.S. House seats up and down California?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130967106/619552234/1321942921?&refcode=20260507_FR_45DO_SpecialElection&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWQ3YTQ5ZC04MjRhLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_kgptkZcLKveX4jVQa3S3p_XqMddzsG3MOKf7wv_nw=) ** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130967107/619552235/1321942921?refcode=20260507_FR_45DO_SpecialElection&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWQ3YTQ5ZC04MjRhLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u_kgptkZcLKveX4jVQa3S3p_XqMddzsG3MOKf7wv_nw=) **Here’s the truth: We did not budget for this.** At the start of the year, nobody expected California Democrats would suddenly need to organize, mobilize voters, and compete in TWO surprise special elections on top of our work defending democracy, fighting voter suppression, and preparing for the 2026 midterms. But this is _exactly_ why CADEM invests in year-round grassroots organizing. We call it Forever Organizing: ✅ Keeping organizers on the ground year-round;
✅ Maintaining voter contact programs between election cycles;
✅ Building the infrastructure to respond immediately when opportunities like this arise. _And now, that investment is being put to the test._ We have a real chance to compete for critical House seats before November. name: The Democrats
subject: Urgent redistricting update
body:
---
Have you seen this, Derek? [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260507_7047_fr&amount=7&refcode2=7047_22930333_y8tVBW&akid=7047%2E22930333%2Ey8tVBW) That’s right. Just days after Trump’s far-right Supreme Court decided _Louisiana v. Callais_ , which gutted the Voting Rights Act, **Republicans in Tennessee are gerrymandering their map to split up Memphis, silencing voters in the state’s largest majority-Black city by pairing them with rural voters hundreds of miles away.** And we’ll be honest: _It’s only a matter of time before other Republican states follow_. Republicans know their agenda is historically unpopular, which is why Democrats have been on a winning streak since Trump took office last January. So Republicans are redrawing themselves more House seats in a desperate attempt to stop us from taking back the majority this November. **Derek, this means we need our grassroots team to step up like never before.** The DNC is organizing across the country, registering new Democrats in key battleground states, and providing resources to state parties and campaigns so they’re well-equipped to fight and _win_ this year. [**But we know it’s going to be an uphill battle that requires a massive influx of resources. Can we count on you to chip in $7 to the DNC today to help us win back Congress this year?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260507_7047_fr&amount=7&refcode2=7047_22930333_y8tVBW&akid=7047%2E22930333%2Ey8tVBW) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260507_7047_fr&refcode2=7047_22930333_y8tVBW&akid=7047%2E22930333%2Ey8tVBW)**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: A plan to actually fix California:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41290%2E3422442%2E5rtjXI)
Peter, at the last four debates, Katie showed up the way she always does—focused on the facts, grounded in reality, and fighting for working families.
Katie gets it. She knows firsthand what it means when rent eats up half a paycheck. She’s lived the struggles of juggling child care costs, rising prices, and making the tough choices of what has to give.
And instead of dodging those challenges, she broke them down the way she always does— _with a plan to actually fix them._
The rest of the stage? Same old story.
A self-funding billionaire trying to buy the seat.
A candidate bankrolled by Big Oil.
And MAGA Republicans pushing Trump’s agenda in California.
**Katie cut through all the noise.**
She’s not taking corporate cash, funneling her own money into her campaign, or bringing an extreme agenda to the table. She has a clear focus: _making California more affordable and accountable to the people who actually live here._
And if there had been a whiteboard on stage, you know she would’ve used it to show exactly who’s benefiting from the status quo. _(Spoiler: it’s not working families.)_
**With less than a month until the primary and only two candidates advancing to November’s ballot, we need all hands on deck to make sure Katie is one of them.**
**[Can you chip in $5 or whatever makes sense to you today to help us reach more voters and keep this momentum going?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260507_3_ak.AjHQMZ&refcode=em20260507-41290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41290%2E3422442%2E5rtjXI)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260507_3_ak.AjHQMZ&refcode=em20260507-41290&t=22&akid=41290%2E3422442%2E5rtjXI)
Thank you,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260507-41290&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41290_3422442_5rtjXI&akid=41290%2E3422442%2E5rtjXI)**

clean_body: Peter, at the last four debates, Katie showed up the way she always does—focused on the facts, grounded in reality, and fighting for working families. Katie gets it. She knows firsthand what it means when rent eats up half a paycheck. She’s lived the struggles of juggling child care costs, rising prices, and making the tough choices of what has to give. And instead of dodging those challenges, she broke them down the way she always does— with a plan to actually fix them. The rest of the stage? Same old story. A self-funding billionaire trying to buy the seat. A candidate bankrolled by Big Oil. And MAGA Republicans pushing Trump’s agenda in California. Katie cut through all the noise. She’s not taking corporate cash, funneling her own money into her campaign, or bringing an extreme agenda to the table. She has a clear focus: making California more affordable and accountable to the people who actually live here. And if there had been a whiteboard on stage, you know she would’ve used it to show exactly who’s benefiting from the status quo. (Spoiler: it’s not working families.) With less than a month until the primary and only two candidates advancing to November’s ballot, we need all hands on deck to make sure Katie is one of them. Thank you, Team Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Marcy Kaptur HQ
subject: Help Marcy and the Voter Protection Project defend one of the toughest battleground districts in the nation
body:
This opponent would be a disaster for OH-09.
| Team, it's Marcy Kaptur HQ. The Voter Protection Project wanted us to let you know: Marcy — who's running to defend one of the toughest battleground districts in the nation — officially has an opponent.

**He's a hard-right MAGA candidate who came within a fraction of a percentage point of defeating Marcy in 2024. We need all hands on deck to defend this seat.**

[If you're able, please split a contribution between Marcy and the Voter Protection Project today to help us defend this seat.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108929?t=6&akid=24227%2E878179%2Ehq3pxv) | [SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108929?t=7&akid=24227%2E878179%2Ehq3pxv)

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: The People I’m Fighting For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
I’ll never forget the people who helped me when I was young. And I’ll never stop fighting for the people who feel unseen in Oregon today.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,There are parts of your life that shape who you become long before anyone knows your name or sees you on a debate stage.This post from Connie hit me hard because she was there during some of the hardest years of my life. [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-y/) Connie knew me as a teenager when life was unstable, uncertain, and sometimes overwhelming. There were periods where I was trying to hold together school, work, family struggles, and simply figuring out where I was going to sleep or how I was going to keep moving forward. Connie never judged me. She never treated me like I was broken or disposable. She simply made space for me to breathe, regroup, and believe I could still build a future.She bought me my first work uniform.That may sound like a small thing to some people, but when you're young and struggling, those moments stay with you forever. Connie showed me that people can choose to care about someone even when they don't have to. She showed me grace, stability, and kindness at a time in my life when I desperately needed all three.There are very few adults who had a front row seat to those years of my life. Connie did.And I think about that often now, especially when I travel around Oregon and hear from families who feel like they are barely hanging on. Parents trying to navigate addiction or mental health crises with their kids. Small business owners working nonstop, wondering if they can keep their doors open as costs keep rising and the state keeps adding fees and red tape. Families watching homelessness, crime, and dysfunction spread through communities that once felt safe and stable.If you feel, like I do, that those Oregonians need a Governor who knows what it's like to fight day in and day out, I hope you'll consider donating to our campaign today. May 19 is less than two weeks away, and every dollar donated helps us reach more voters before ballots are due. [Can You Chip In Now?](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-j/) I understand what it feels like when life is uncertain. I understand what it means to need people who step up rather than look away.That experience shaped how I lead as a county commissioner. It shaped why I worked to expand addiction recovery services, crisis stabilization, supportive housing, wildfire recovery efforts, and public safety resources in Marion County. And it shaped why I decided to run for Governor.This race has never been about titles for me. It's about whether Oregon is still a place where people can build a life, raise a family, recover from hardship, and genuinely believe their children can have a better life and that our state's tomorrow will be better than today. I believe it can.But Oregon needs leadership grounded in real-life experience, not political talking points or consultants' scripts. We need leaders who understand these issues because they've lived close enough to them to know the stakes. Leaders who will deliver real results for real people doing real jobs. Not just the insiders and political class. I'll never forget the people who helped me when I was young. And I'll never stop fighting for the people who feel unseen in Oregon today.Thank you, Connie. This campaign is for, and about, Oregonians like you.Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor**P.S.** Election Day is May 19, and we are in the final stretch of this campaign. If you believe Oregon needs experienced leadership grounded in real life and real results, [I'd be grateful for your support.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-t/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-i/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-d/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-h/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-k/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-li-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-akiuldk-l-q)
---|---|---|---
Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell.updatemyprofile.com/y-akiuldk-E19159AE-hhlrhljhit-a) | [Unsubscribe](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-u-akiuldk-hhlrhljhit-f/)
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Tennessee Redistricting, Used Car Prices, and a Nonsensical Roundabout
body:
The Tennessee legislature passed a new congressional map Thursday that carves up the [state's only majority-black district](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GOiPbgCGFizR0lzYlMvbCbWJsy7t35N4-IkVe4G9npNF838_H-nAYMR0_3AmW97wmuCgCM9SVISUgAqgQkLiiZ0zHi2DVUhshRyHnNTiMn3Vog90BNPQtWDVNs-6HWen2aUdvhnE23_rggh827fpJuc2rsPVGbWFr0d5rcpSzktKMqjPaOOm8Us7DAMo3g4SAnGv3K2PiJ-zxk99QO5_PNtonc6Gm_97opdHLdV3dnv_cFHff6KXkiIyeGr38BxLFEQGJBJfwOR0ViDAnF8Xpioj4G-JH7BGL2PFOA5yCwLEoNTMQk4D6KiwwEQYQ3hXkHNtqQ7kwRiQzNYM8Tofx30v-ktq31X8DAAD___KHk48) in Memphis, sending the GOP-drawn lines to Gov. Bill Lee, who quickly signed them into law.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnDAQgJ_GdCD_YaBwEem03aVNaRl7gImMQfawp337iE2UF7h2vk8zo-_Xp_v0mDCvP_0OlpbDZfiqCYigOIKcoVaAAhErFQyEeb0qOMmlaXnf8tFFj-nldBPtAiBBNWDFMIxS6VHIZrPjJEMv1DQo0HNU0yjnwczzErWYpJpMg_bexns-Cs5NLzojjec-COEDaBCBaQ4R6Sjd7wMzbbCk1_GE0oVjb5LdiM7K1A8mH0w-MD-hUheR_EoQtlu6iXpctLt6XCUAUx-we0xMmnu4Q8RrZ-rj9Bjb0xfKUOqG5z8e_H56XPPb-A_FyFvVK_e3wpWRvNNy6LXkPVeiKTaeX5gSVjMwzdf74Ptj-lbmp5V_AgAA__8Ng5GD) | |
# Friday, May 8, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1886, Dr. John Pemberton took a jug of his “excellent” new soda syrup down the street to Jacobs’ Pharmacy in Atlanta. The first glass of Coca-Cola went on sale that day for a nickel. ([See Photo](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OnDAQAJ_GdEZmj7_GRRq6S5sSLfaCNzL2yd47xNtHl1f4-tGMNH-e6xM5cjp-40lW9rwmumokESqrUEpUK1Ehz1UKO-F0vCutYGDUZtBmXj1yvNe-8XYnAno0ZLtpmuHRzx00wcLup34yNBChgQG9n6dh2xxOAOjBN2y_NjOYuTNmHLp2hBENuq5DRz11TvWGPEsu7d_MSQLt8c4fKq3LZxNtEHlV9filYFGwXNfVuuxQuxzR5fOF6f6CChbc8lv0uypYAlfJ5VawSCC9cZGg865RF9oL1cDp0OwJm2L96-IYuY6T6s1xIsf_XfnRrI-FfwEAAP__Qr6A3Q)) What's better for breakfast than a plate of [perfectly fluffy scrambled eggs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuszAURp8GNtD1tTFk8PAv2fKvHZELH3AbYyLsxsrbV-krdD86Rzoft_HmJUhc__sdLi_HGFFSQM44x4wYkRJwYpaUT5myxPU7YWRi21DX0DDOXsJrNPXsFoChazjV9wNrMyiuN6d1B3RYLhad7xYiJjZKG5BdcIGpxb1t1NGgiGynWsvWk5-U8hMM1FQZwiz5ONuvQ2LesITX8cTZTsdeB7fl_EiV_lfxteJrKaXNG-6Spy2-iYqvaTr9_hkwN1jXJt0lhNSk7SjzUWLDDeu-Hy7a1qebH0VCkGT7ytC6ewm_lfynNU_HPwEAAP__ODx4YQ)? In _Et Cetera_ we have a taste test that crowns the winning method. Now we're curious: what's your favorite way to eat eggs? Scrambled, fried, poached, an omelet, or something else? Reply to this email and let us know. Today’s sponsor, [DIT AgTech](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnDAQgJ_GdCD_YaBwEem03aVNaRl7gImMQfawp337iE2UF7h2vk8zo-_Xp_v0mDCvP_0OlpbDZfiqCYigOIKcoVaAAhErFQyEeb0qOMmlaXnf8tFFj-nldBPtAiBBNWDFMIxS6VHIZrPjJEMv1DQo0HNU0yjnwczzErWYpJpMg_bexns-Cs5NLzojjec-COEDaBCBaQ4R6Sjd7wMzbbCk1_GE0oVjb5LdiM7K1A8mH0w-MD-hUheR_EoQtlu6iXpctLt6XCUAUx-we0xMmnu4Q8RrZ-rj9Bjb0xfKUOqG5z8e_H56XPPb-A_FyFvVK_e3wpWRvNNy6LXkPVeiKTaeX5gSVjMwzdf74Ptj-lbmp5V_AgAA__8Ng5GD), is helping ranchers address America’s historic cattle shortage with patented technology designed to improve herd nutrition, increase weight gains, and maximize productivity as beef prices continue to rise.
|
---
## Redistricting Wars Hit Tennessee
The Tennessee legislature passed a new congressional map Thursday that carves up the [state's only majority-black district](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ8GOiPbgCGFizR0lzYlMvbCbWJsy7t35N4-IkVe4G9npNF838_H-nAYMR0_3AmW97wmuCgCM9SVISUgAqgQkLiiZ0zHi2DVUhshRyHnNTiMn3Vog90BNPQtWDVNs-6HWen2aUdvhnE23_rggh827fpJuc2rsPVGbWFr0d5rcpSzktKMqjPaOOm8Us7DAMo3g4SAnGv3K2PiJ-zxk99QO5_PNtonc6Gm_97opdHLdV3dnv_cFHff6KXkiIyeGr38BxLFEQGJBJfwOR0ViDAnF8Xpioj4G-JH7BGL2PFOA5yCwLEoNTMQk4D6KiwwEQYQ3hXkHNtqQ7kwRiQzNYM8Tofx30v-ktq31X8DAAD___KHk48) in Memphis, sending the GOP-drawn lines to Gov. Bill Lee, who quickly signed them into law. The vote unfolded amid air horns, sirens, and chants from protesters in the gallery, while Democrats in white linked arms in the well of the chamber. Republicans approved the new map 25-5. State Rep. Justin Pearson, a Memphis Democrat running for the seat being eliminated, called the maps ["racist tools of white supremacy,"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHuozAMxp8mbKDEQKBDhluy9dYbURoM-BQSlLhFffsTlap7gP9i2ZL16ff7_tynu6NAcf3tdjS8pCniWQIyY54YY8RSEDPOVDiTZ4rrs-AEEnQt-1qO0-wovKeums2CCNhWaNQwjNB2o4JqM-rRqhG9Vot8LI8O9Nz7xYHGXrmlG3RF5kqTvRyVlLpXjQbtpPNKOY8dKi86iTNxys3fRJE3XMI7vTA3Pu1VMBvzUUT7S4AVYM_zbL7cLl4vAmzhlN8C7OUmwB4pEJO_1oArleD4mVGAvUAEWNl_x3_xesf92KjUPsU1YymUogt1oBfWz2N2jKX-XALseLu17a3VUg4CbJXNfJwUAhU9iE6uu6PwYecfFf4y8C8AAP__VTuVIQ) while fellow Rep. Justin Jones, a Democrat, burned a photo of a Confederate flag in the Capitol rotunda. Tennessee joins a wave of states redrawing their lines ahead of the midterms, with [eight states](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuozAQxvHTmM7INgaTwsU2dG_bLdFghmTeGhvZk6DcfkWKvcCrRxr9f9-fr_kLKFK6_4YdPW95TnjWiMxYZsaUsFbEgitVLhSY0v1ZcTbKDFL1Uo3zChTfs21WvyEa7Br02rnRdHbUpnl4i0FrDK6HZVj0hta4sGq39DfXu1uAhvz1TfVq1EoNvW4HM4CCoDUEtKiDsApX4lza70yJH7jFd35haUPem-gfzEcV3S9hJmGm8zzbtIRLcd2FmY4ciSlUYaZPNkYMTDkJM_0HyoLHc4kUIFV5QK1yh0PWIxJfZFkZGKuMOaHc4TsX4rdcIoS_ciVZQoLOdrfONsWvx0kxUh2csOq-A8VPJ_9o3Jc3_wIAAP__plCRsg) having already approved new maps, including Virginia, where Democrats redrew lines to favor their party.
## Tornadoes Tear Through Mississippi
Powerful storms spawned [multiple tornadoes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAcw09jbwr0LWfQ0CXb69rRUGTKViFbhvR_CXL7wr3CA7gQBAjy9-dr_gq55GP9HXZ4SnU-8O4FRGgz4TjQO9Cw5E4tR8rH-t0xSy4t44bxaV5CLp9Zj4tPgIQa4YVzk1R6EnLcvAoxPSekBLintSIi3LWWxqhkRDRmzP5q44ZPgnNrxM1KG3iIQoQIDREHzbFkqu32t-aDNqTyqS-0W6z7WPxGdPZB_RrkY5CPcF4HrugyjXIsGORjz71fOs_MqLYjLJUtYQ8rWMcLDaxTbXtnvX7ThtCJ6aQ4XFKwTqikJTfCCe3EPUYpzP05Nr-c71xK7tYNmq97yOX_JvoRyJeX_wIAAP__A7SIaw) across Mississippi on Wednesday night, damaging nearly 500 homes and injuring at least 17 people, with Lincoln and Lamar counties hit hardest. ## Leavitt Welcomes Baby, Makes History
White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt announced Thursday that she gave birth to a baby girl on May 1, becoming the [first person to give birth](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7rAAY0IKir9Jl7-90iKwNntHwIKNrbz9ydddfeXoG41m5uM-3x0mzOt_9wRLS5kzHC0BEdSZIGdoDaBCwEYVPWFeXw1myaVmfGLczMFhes-qD3YBkDD2YMXlYuSojJB9tMZcuQZtpuvy8EoZPTrwyzUIIdUilOjRnml84kZwricxaKkdd14I50GB8J3iEJBKHT4LZoqwpHfZoQ6-PPtkI9HWuvFfJ2-dvB3HMeSHP1ecvJO3rSQk9O2EEQlYLK8GvxXbKrTGGvgK5OqbfblaEmZgCdyORGzFHRp7YKV42koOzEdMgVWf3agUH3lfbdgOTAmbvnSKr0-H6ack_enZ3crvAAAA__-sNZC2) while serving in the role. Less than a week before delivery, mentalist Oz Pearlman tried [guessing Leavitt's baby name](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd1gwBtsNxTbusu2WFoFJMrsYLJiN5Xz9k98vvOY2Vzq69_y5rTdPifLzt9_Q8aOsGY-WkBnrypgztoZYMVLjSoEpP_83XEHBKJWVal6jp3SupovugQg4dOj0NM0wmFlD93LgrZ2GOVoz3tGihVmbQVuMYdZGjbEjd9GUVbNWarS6H2H0ygetfUCDOgijMBKX2v8tlPmFj3SWN9Y-lK1L7sW8NzH8ErAIWI7j6Hn7XJ2A5SILWJS9YhKwlI_c0de0-SxDqRUDp1Pu18HAGOU_X0uijDKhfxOzvPv7KbPfUMDSVRf3g1KiNk7CqOfmKX2v4B-pezv4CgAA__-ub4KG) at the White House Correspondents' Dinner and wrote down "Viviane," missing it by one letter. Cabinet members are filling in during her leave. Secretary of State Marco Rubio [took the podium Tuesday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u6zAQhE9DdRTI1e8rWLxGndOmFJbSStqEJg1ybcG3D5QrpBtggBl83-dtviEHjvsH3snJluZIZwkkQnkWipFKIcq0cpHMi3Dcn4VmMNBr02kzzityeM9ttbqNCKipyNlhGKFpRwvV4ZrOjDDadkOPaC39IxxG773pqVvBNhW7a810ZrTG9J2te-jR4GItLtSSXVRraGVJuf5KHOWgLbzTi3K9pHsV3CHyKKr5r2BSMJ3nWS--XBRXr2C6ooLpG3MKHEkHwheLaIwxPeNCRXvOcui06YOy9ujfeuccFExVduvj5BC49INqzX5HDr-38idXLwc_AQAA__8793_5), with other top administration officials expected to follow.

# [The Rigged Map --Why Do Election Results So Rarely Match The Mood Of The Country?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=196770848&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2NzcwODQ4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzgyMzU0NTUsImV4cCI6MTc4MDgyNzQ1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yw5mcIj-o3TYw61HtA7j65T6F_9WvOAU4NlCGtZ4OFo)
### This is a 10-part series about the answer -- and the most consequential fight in American democracy.
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/@theangrydem) and [Democracy Watch](https://substack.com/@democracywatch1)
---
| May 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)| | [](https://substack.com/@democracywatch1)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mattdiemer/p/the-rigged-map-why-do-election-results?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In April 2026, the Supreme Court of the United States delivered its most consequential blow to American voting rights in decades. In Louisiana v. Callais, the Court gutted Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act -- the provision that for over sixty years gave communities of color their only reliable legal tool to challenge maps designed to erase their political power. Without it, states may now draw maps that crush minority representation, call it a partisan decision rather than a racial one, and the courts cannot intervene. As Justice Kagan wrote in dissent, Section 2 is now "all but a dead letter." The last guardrail is gone.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..NAnwpWcah51CxmioBxrvViU7LA4bhntSi3BTtfT_ry8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=196770848)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..NAnwpWcah51CxmioBxrvViU7LA4bhntSi3BTtfT_ry8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=196770848)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/16a8f9bc-e7e7-4488-8c7f-1a45e758dbca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Justice Kagan
That ruling did not come out of nowhere. It was the latest chapter in a decades-long campaign -- planned, funded, and executed with remarkable discipline -- to rig the rules of American democracy before most Americans noticed what was happening.
This series is about that campaign. How it was built. How it works. What it has already cost us. And what -- if anything -- can be done about it.
But before we get into who did what and when, we need to establish something that this series will return to again and again. Because if you walk away from this introduction with one idea, we want it to be this one.
* * *
## **This is not a Republican problem. This is an American problem.**
[ Subscribe to Democracy Watch](https://substack.com/@democracywatch1)
[Subscribe to Democracy Watch](https://substack.com/@democracywatch1)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad26aef1-652b-44ba-96ca-022a9c3437b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Gerrymandered Districs](https://substack.com/redirect/014935dc-d36d-49f9-bc54-133e717e4e74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We will document in this series how Republicans built the modern redistricting machine and used it more aggressively, more systematically, and more effectively than Democrats have. That is not a partisan opinion. It is a documented fact, confirmed by the Brennan Center, by academic researchers at Duke, MIT, and Harvard, and by the Republicans who designed the strategy and wrote about it openly at the time.
But Democrats have done it too. After the 2020 census, Democrats in Illinois redrew their congressional map so aggressively that Republicans were left holding just 3 of 17 seats -- in a state where a fair map would have produced roughly 6. That is gerrymandering. It is wrong when Republicans do it in Texas and North Carolina, and it is wrong when Democrats do it in Illinois.
We make this point not to create false equivalence -- the scale and coordination of Republican gerrymandering since 2010 has no Democratic parallel -- but because the argument that this is simply a team sport, where your side's gerrymandering is acceptable and theirs is not, is exactly the kind of thinking that has allowed this problem to fester for decades.
Guardian graphic. Source: Wisconsin State Legislature Data Portal
Here is the thing that most political coverage gets wrong. Republicans are winning the redistricting war. That is true. But winning implies there are two sides in competition and one is ahead. That framing misses what is actually happening -- because the people losing are not Democrats. The people losing are voters. All voters. The scoreboard that matters is not R versus D. It is corporations and wealthy donors on one side, and everyone else on the other. And on that scoreboard, the donors are winning in a landslide -- in red districts and blue districts alike.
Think about what a safe seat actually means in practice. A representative in a gerrymandered district does not need to win a competitive general election. The map guarantees the seat. The only thing that can threaten their career is losing a primary -- and corporate money has now colonized primaries too. Which means there is no longer any moment in the electoral cycle where an ordinary voter's preference reliably determines the outcome.
You can see this in the most basic act of democratic accountability: the town hall. Research drawing on more than 23,000 town hall meetings over eight years found that the average representative holds just nine town halls per Congress -- and many hold none at all during the two years between elections. In March 2025, the chair of the National Republican Congressional Committee advised members in a closed-door meeting to stop holding in-person town halls entirely. The House Speaker agreed. Several Texas Republicans replaced public forums with private meetings -- not with constituents broadly, but with business owners and stakeholder groups. Not the people who vote for them. The people who fund them.
This is what a safe seat produces. A representative who has stopped needing you. Gerrymandering is the tactic. But voters are the target. All of them.
* * *
[Share The Angry Democrat](https://substack..9HbsnNHdi1xb8BrlRcwztbIyAqp51PIgNcdCTkNoovA?)
[Share The Angry Democrat](https://substack..9HbsnNHdi1xb8BrlRcwztbIyAqp51PIgNcdCTkNoovA?)
## **What this series will show you.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/291d7e27-ac78-4ee6-92a0-d317f379f47e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Partisan Gerrymandering](https://substack.com/redirect/08fd9eaf-822b-4908-85ae-79b5e2d57acd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Over ten installments, we are going to take this apart completely -- and then show you what can actually be done about it.
**We start where the machine started. In Part 1** , we go back to 2010 -- to REDMAP, to Karl Rove's Wall Street Journal op-ed, to the $30 million that flipped 20 state legislative chambers and handed Republicans control of the mapmaking process for an entire decade. We document what Democrats were doing instead, and why that failure compounded into the structural disadvantage that persists today.
**In Part 2** , we follow the legal guardrails as they were dismantled one ruling at a time -- from _Buckley v. Valeo_ in 1976, which opened the door to unlimited political spending, through _Citizens United_ in 2010, through _Rucho v. Common Cause_ in 2019, through _Callais_ last month. Each decision narrowed the field of legal recourse available to voters. Together they closed it entirely.
**Part 3** draws the full circle -- from corporate PAC money to redistricting to policy outcomes. We show, with sourced data, what happens to healthcare legislation, wage policy, gun safety, and environmental regulation in gerrymandered states versus competitive ones. This is where the abstract becomes concrete: what rigged maps actually cost people, in dollars and in lives.
**Part 4** is the mathematics. Geographic sorting, the S-curve, the reason a 10-point national wave can produce a 5-seat swing when maps are drawn to absorb it. We draw on research from Duke, MIT, and Harvard to show how the numbers work -- and what neutral maps would have produced in Ohio and across the country.
**Part 5** covers the technology -- the same algorithmic tools that made extreme gerrymandering possible, and the open-source research tools now sitting in university labs that could draw fairer maps than any human legislature has ever produced. This is not a theoretical future. The tools exist. The question is whether voters will demand they be used.
**Part 6** maps the battlefield state by state in the post-_Callais_ world -- which states are redrawing maps right now, which seats are at risk, and what the floor looks like for Democrats trying to win a House majority against maps explicitly designed to stop them.
**Part 7** is the Ohio story in full -- redistricting history from 2010 to today, the seven court rejections, the legislature that ignored every one of them, and what the next cycle looks like if nothing changes.
**Part 8** is about solutions -- what has actually worked, in California, Virginia, Michigan, and elsewhere. Independent commissions. Algorithmic maps. Multi-member districts. The Fair Representation Act. We do not cover solutions that sound good but have no path to implementation. We cover what has moved the needle and why.
**Part 9** is the timeline -- what Democrats and reform advocates must do in the next four years, before the 2030 census resets the cycle. The 2026 Ohio Supreme Court races. The 2028 seats. The governor's race. The ballot initiative pathway. Year by year, what the window looks like and how quickly it closes.
**And Part 10** is yours. Specific, actionable, and honest about what one person can actually do -- whether you live in Ohio or not, whether you have $25 or $2,500, whether you want to donate, organize, vote in a judicial race you've never thought about before, or simply understand the fight well enough to explain it to someone else.
* * *
_**The system is rigged. That is not a talking point -- it is a documented, litigated, peer-reviewed fact. But it was not rigged against one party. It was rigged against people. Against the nurse in a county that lost its hospital. Against the factory worker whose wages haven't moved in seventeen years. Against the parent -- Republican or Democrat -- who wanted their legislature to act and watched it do nothing. Against every voter whose representative stopped showing up the moment the map made the seat safe. The coalition that can fix this is not one party. It is everyone who has noticed that their government no longer works for them. That is a very large number of people. This series is for all of them.**_

This is a 10-part series about the answer -- and the most consequential fight in American democracy. | | and | May 8 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | In April 2026, the Supreme Court of the United States delivered its most consequential blow to American voting rights in decades. In Louisiana v. Callais, the Court gutted Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act -- the provision that for over sixty years gave communities of color their only reliable legal tool to challenge maps designed to erase their political power. Without it, states may now draw maps that crush minority representation, call it a partisan decision rather than a racial one, and the courts cannot intervene. As Justice Kagan wrote in dissent, Section 2 is now "all but a dead letter." The last guardrail is gone. | | ---|---|--- Justice Kagan That ruling did not come out of nowhere. It was the latest chapter in a decades-long campaign -- planned, funded, and executed with remarkable discipline -- to rig the rules of American democracy before most Americans noticed what was happening. This series is about that campaign. How it was built. How it works. What it has already cost us. And what -- if anything -- can be done about it. But before we get into who did what and when, we need to establish something that this series will return to again and again. Because if you walk away from this introduction with one idea, we want it to be this one. This is not a Republican problem. This is an American problem. | | ---|---|--- We will document in this series how Republicans built the modern redistricting machine and used it more aggressively, more systematically, and more effectively than Democrats have. That is not a partisan opinion. It is a documented fact, confirmed by the Brennan Center, by academic researchers at Duke, MIT, and Harvard, and by the Republicans who designed the strategy and wrote about it openly at the time. But Democrats have done it too. After the 2020 census, Democrats in Illinois redrew their congressional map so aggressively that Republicans were left holding just 3 of 17 seats -- in a state where a fair map would have produced roughly 6. That is gerrymandering. It is wrong when Republicans do it in Texas and North Carolina, and it is wrong when Democrats do it in Illinois. We make this point not to create false equivalence -- the scale and coordination of Republican gerrymandering since 2010 has no Democratic parallel -- but because the argument that this is simply a team sport, where your side's gerrymandering is acceptable and theirs is not, is exactly the kind of thinking that has allowed this problem to fester for decades. Guardian graphic. Source: Wisconsin State Legislature Data Portal Here is the thing that most political coverage gets wrong. Republicans are winning the redistricting war. That is true. But winning implies there are two sides in competition and one is ahead. That framing misses what is actually happening -- because the people losing are not Democrats. The people losing are voters. All voters. The scoreboard that matters is not R versus D. It is corporations and wealthy donors on one side, and everyone else on the other. And on that scoreboard, the donors are winning in a landslide -- in red districts and blue districts alike. Think about what a safe seat actually means in practice. A representative in a gerrymandered district does not need to win a competitive general election. The map guarantees the seat. The only thing that can threaten their career is losing a primary -- and corporate money has now colonized primaries too. Which means there is no longer any moment in the electoral cycle where an ordinary voter's preference reliably determines the outcome. You can see this in the most basic act of democratic accountability: the town hall. Research drawing on more than 23,000 town hall meetings over eight years found that the average representative holds just nine town halls per Congress -- and many hold none at all during the two years between elections. In March 2025, the chair of the National Republican Congressional Committee advised members in a closed-door meeting to stop holding in-person town halls entirely. The House Speaker agreed. Several Texas Republicans replaced public forums with private meetings -- not with constituents broadly, but with business owners and stakeholder groups. Not the people who vote for them. The people who fund them. This is what a safe seat produces. A representative who has stopped needing you. Gerrymandering is the tactic. But voters are the target. All of them. ? ?
